description: Laid back leather slip-on shoes from red tape are a great combination of style and features. The full grain leather lends it a natural finish. Team this pair with chinos or jeans and shirts.UpperFull-grain leather upper for absolute comfort, durability and styleSquared toe for more toe spaceElastic gores on the sides of the tongue for easy insertion and removal of the feetFabric inner lining for ultimate breathabilityCushioned collar and tongue for greater comfortErgonomically curved and padded footbed for comfortMidsolePU midsole for lightweight comfort and shock absorptionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with textured lugs on the forefoot and heel for greater comfortFlex grooves for greater flexibility of the feet shoe careUse a branded leather conditioner and brushDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
